ddls:
CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "long" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the location */,
  "admin_level" TEXT /* Administrative level of the location (e.g., city, county, state, country) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecasting_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecasting model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the forecasting model */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the forecasting model */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Current version of the model */,
  "model_status" TEXT /* Status of the model (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location for which the forecast is generated */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecasting model used to generate the forecast */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date for which the forecast is generated */,
  "forecast_cases" INTEGER /* Number of forecasted cases */,
  "forecast_hospitalizations" INTEGER /* Number of forecasted hospitalizations */,
  "forecast_fatalities" INTEGER /* Number of forecasted fatalities */,
  "forecast_version" TEXT /* Version of the forecast */,
  "forecast_method" TEXT /* Method used to generate the forecast (e.g., machine learning, statistical) */,
  "forecast_confidence_interval_lower" INTEGER /* Lower bound of the confidence interval for the forecast */,
  "forecast_confidence_interval_upper" INTEGER /* Upper bound of the confidence interval for the forecast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasts_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasts_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES forecasting_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecast_model_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecasting model */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "performance_date" TEXT /* Date for which the performance is measured */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance metric used to evaluate the model */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_model_performance_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES forecasting_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_model_performance_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_model_performance_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the user belongs */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecast being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "accessed_at" TEXT /* Exact timestamp when the data was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_forecast_id FOREIGN KEY ("forecast_id") REFERENCES forecasts ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "location_forecasting_models" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecasting model */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date from which the model is effective for the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id", "model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecast_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecast */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was generated */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the forecast version (e.g., draft, approved, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_versions_forecast_id FOREIGN KEY ("forecast_id") REFERENCES forecasts ("forecast_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecast_model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecasting model */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was generated */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the model version (e.g., draft, approved, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES forecasting_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "location_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was generated */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the location version (e.g., draft, approved, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_location_versions_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the performance metric (e.g., percentage, cases) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecast_model_performance_metrics" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecasting model */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance metric */,
  "performance_date" TEXT /* Date for which the performance was measured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id", "metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "location_forecast_versions" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecast version */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date from which the forecast version is effective for the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id", "version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecast_model_versions_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecasting model */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the change */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_model_versions_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_model_versions_history_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES forecast_model_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_model_versions_history_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES forecasting_models ("model_id")
)
